title: Smaller Elytra
description: A texture pack that makes the vanilla elytra texture smaller.
body:
# Smaller Elytra
Smaller Elytra is a resource pack that slightly reduces the size of the elytra while keeping a clean, vanilla-friendly look.
## Features
- Makes the elytra model smaller
- Improves visibility while flying and moving
- Clean, simple, vanilla-like design
- Purely visual change with no gameplay impact
## **Why use this pack?**
The default elytra can take up a lot of screen space and feel bulky. Smaller Elytra makes it more subtle and less intrusive, improving visibility and overall aesthetics while still fitting perfectly into the vanilla Minecraft style.
## Important
> If you want the model to look like this while wearing the elytra, you must have no cape equipped, otherwise it overwrites the item texture while wearing it. The item itself will be as shown here even with a cape on though.
